name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BodyRollUpHelper.VelocityScale
summary: Scales perceived body velocity.  The higher this value gets, the more quickly the velocity measure saturates, resulting in a tighter roll at slower speeds. (NB: Set to 1 to match earlier behavior).
remarks:
Default value = 0.2f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
